filesChanged.summary: Creates a fresh MCP Server instance per Streamable HTTP session so repeated initialize requests no longer crash mcp-velo with an Already connected to a transport error.

notes: Diagnosed velo-03 as a contributor_tool_bug: Velo Market Data had been auto-deactivated after /velo/mcp crashed during repeated Streamable HTTP initialize requests.
Public /velo/health was healthy, but /velo/mcp initially returned 502 and PM2 logs showed Already connected to a transport; after the server.ts fix, repeated initializes and tools/list return 200.
Reactivated the Velo Market Data marketplace row after endpoint verification; it had isActive=false and autoDeactivated=true.
Rerun selected the active Velo Market Data tool, called list_options_products and get_market_rows successfully, and returned the requested BTC Deribit options values.
The release-decision schema validation command was attempted first but blocked by the pipeline control-plane guard; the file itself reported schemaVersion 2026-04-17.

velo-03.note: Fixed: the query returned an answer with Velo tool calls and exact index_price, iv_1w, iv_1m, skew_1w, skew_1m, and dollar_volume values.
